name: Amina El Idrissi
title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
about: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 8+ years building SaaS platforms and internal tools. Strong in product thinking, performance optimization, and API design.
objectives: Lead high-impact product engineering while coaching teams and shipping reliable, user-centered software.

projects.title: Multi-tenant Billing Platform
details: Designed and implemented subscription workflows for 20k+ active users.
Reduced payment failure rates by 31% through retry orchestration.
Integrated Stripe webhooks with idempotent event processing.

projects.title: Recruitment Analytics Dashboard
details: Built a data visualization suite for hiring funnel metrics.
Improved dashboard load time from 4.5s to 1.7s.
Implemented role-based access control and audit logging.
Led architecture decisions for customer-facing SaaS modules.
Introduced typed API contracts reducing production bugs by 27%.
Mentored 4 mid-level engineers across frontend and backend topics.
Developed B2B workflow tools used by 150+ enterprise clients.
Built CI pipelines and release automation to shorten delivery cycles.
Partnered with product designers to improve onboarding completion.
